sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32270" key="e)kkrousmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκ-κρουσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n32270.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">waning</tr_> of the moon, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐ. καὶ μείωσις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">G.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
